name: Out of Credits Apps
subtitle: Sports streams. No ads. Your way.
description: Home of StreamCenter — a free, open sports streaming app that lets you watch live games from any source you choose. Add your own stream sites, favorite your teams and leagues, and enjoy completely ad-free playback. No subscriptions, no popups, no nonsense.

apps.name: StreamCenter
apps.subtitle: Live sports streams, zero ads.
apps.localizedDescription:
StreamCenter is your all-in-one hub for live sports streaming.

Watch NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, soccer, MMA, boxing, and more — pulled straight from the web, with no ads interrupting the action.

• Add any sports streaming site as a custom source
• Browse live and upcoming games across every league
• Favorite your teams and leagues for instant access
• Ad-free playback powered by a built-in content blocker
• Supports m3u8 and DASH streams with native AVPlayer quality
• No account required. No subscription. Completely free.

versions.localizedDescription: Smarter stream finding across SPA-based sources: the scraper now intercepts the JSON API calls a page's own JavaScript makes during load and extracts game entries from those responses directly — so sources like ppv.to (which serve game data via XHR rather than rendered HTML) are found and matched without navigating to any game page. Fixed a navigation bug where the walk could follow a link off to a completely different streaming site (e.g. buffstreams.plus sending the walk to thestreameast.one) because team names appeared in the destination URL. Added a smarter fallback for login-walled direct game URLs: the walk now backs up to the source root and tries to reach the game via the site's own client-side routing before giving up.

Redesigned TV guide: taller channel rows with a logo beside each team name, the LIVE/start time on its own line, and a light-red treatment for live games so the red 'now' line stays visible. Channel column now shows a 'CODE N' label (e.g. MLB 1) with stylized icons. Settings and all the favorites pages get a dark-purple theme with amber icons to match the guide.

Landscape widescreen viewer: rotate your phone and the stream takes over the screen in a flat-screen TV frame on a stand, with the channel up/down/prev controls beside it. Guide improvements: the timeline now extends to the last game of the day instead of cutting off at midnight, and game blocks are wide enough to keep team names on one line (long names truncate with an ellipsis). The "could not load stream" error is now a compact slate over the TV static.

Fix AirPlay channel-swap glitch: replaceCurrentItem replaces the old AVQueuePlayer+AVPlayerLooper approach that briefly stopped the player (and flashed black on the TV) during every channel switch. Two-phase foundation model scraper now profiles each site's URL pattern and card CSS class once per session, pre-filters links before the model sees them, and handles abbreviation-style team URLs natively.

HostFallback silently retries TLD variants when a source hostname fails DNS (content-block / carrier filter / Screen Time). Looser league matching catches /league/nflstreams, /nbaregular66, /mlbwildcard style slugs. Plus prior fixes: CachedAsyncImage, persistent TeamLogoStore, word-boundary team match, UFL→Other, ESPN-aware classification, generic API discovery. No default sources — add your own.

news.title: StreamCenter is here!
news.caption: Watch live sports from any source — completely ad-free.
